channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Snapped tree, 20th May
item.description:
This tree snapped in high winds about two months ago after two weeks a plastic barrier was put there two months ago barrier now gone tree still in a dangerous condition as could fall into the road next big wind we have

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenoaks Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car not moved, 20th May
item.description:
This car has suddenly turned up outside my house and hasn’t moved for about a week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blacksmiths Lane, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 20th May
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): County Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle blocking garage, 20th May
item.description:
Untaxed and uninsured vehicle blocking the garage entry

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maximfeldt Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No street cleaning, 20th May
item.description:
Another week and another pile of mess that Hackney street cleaners have not cleared. Hackney if this continues an enforcement is done and a council tax rebate . Please clean the street ! I will continue to report until you meet your obligations.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: HACKNEY HAVE LEFT RUBBLE FOR 8 months, 20th May
item.description:
Hackney you are disgraceful. You dug up the pavement and just left your rubble dumped for 8 months. Hackney you keep doing this . COME AND CLEAN UP YOUR WASTE !

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous medical waste, 20th May
item.description:
Another week another load of medical waste dumped . Hackney YOU MUST INVESTIGATE this illegal weekly dumping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Skip affecting waste collection/ Trade for business, 20th May
item.description:
Skip has been full for about a week, but not been collected. The brewery use the space for trade but haven't been able to do so. Bin collection hasn't been possible for multiple businesses as can't get bins past resulting in build up which is only going to get worse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 133, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove (Along wall of Joe the Juice)-Flytipping-5th Complaint, 20th May
item.description:
5th Complaint: It is completely unacceptable that this is a site for dumping/non-removal of a toilet tank lid and nothing is being done about its removal and it has now encouraged more flytipping and inappropriate disposal. The fact that it is a street full of young children and the health and safety is dismissed is shocking. The Duty of Care is not being demonstrated of not enforcing the law towards the organisation or residence in regards to the responsible manner of rubbish disposal/removal, where it will encourage unhygienic practices.This sends a message that this conduct has no accountability. Health and safety of the residents and wider community should be paramount, not ignored.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 59 Lordship Lane-Flytipping-4th Complaint, 20th May
item.description:
4th complaint: Wooden boards flytipped. They should not be on the pavement as it endangers pedestrians. It should be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike, 20th May
item.description:
Bike ocross pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wedgwood Walk, South Hampstead, Greater London

item.title: Chesterfield Grove (next to car wash)-Bin overflowing with wast. 2nd Complaint, 19th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Uncollected rubbish and fly tipping, 19th May
item.description:
A bin that has been left by the council for months has been left uncollected. People are using it as a dumping site. Also multiple trolleys
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salutation Road, Greenwich
